message: Node started: Search for theoretical physics literature concerning the 'classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation'. Specifically, look for papers discussing the statistical properties or the quantum-to-classical transition of Hawking photons. Identify the three universal dimensionless constants that govern this classicality and provide their exact numerical values. Focus on works involving quantum field theory in curved spacetime and photon statistics (e.g., squeezing parameters, occupation numbers, or specific ratios related to the Hawking temperature and surface gravity).
